<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<AcuityReport xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">

  <MessageVersion>6.4</MessageVersion>
  <PartnerReferenceNumber>OPTEON-TEST-POSTMAN-001</PartnerReferenceNumber>
  <ProviderReferenceNumber>1098330.1</ProviderReferenceNumber>
  <LineItemNumber>1</LineItemNumber>
  <ProductCode>9</ProductCode>
  <ProductName>Valor PDC</ProductName>
  <Fees>
    <VendorFee>100.0000</VendorFee>
    <TotalFees>0</TotalFees>
  </Fees>
  <ValuationInformation>

    <PropertyType>Other</PropertyType>
    <Occupancy>Unknown</Occupancy>
    <CentralAC>false</CentralAC>
    <ProjectTypePUD>false</ProjectTypePUD>
  </ValuationInformation>

    <City>Toledo</City>

    <LicenseState>OH</LicenseState>

  </Agent>
